description: P3 - Polish and cleanup: refactor Demo page inline styles to classes, remove dead navbar.tsx, commit all changes
steps: In osai-web/app/demo/page.tsx: Replace all inline styles with CSS classes. Add `.demo-loading-page` class (min-height:100vh, display:flex, flex-direction:column, align-items:center, justify-content:center, background:var(--bg), gap:20px) and `.demo-logo-mark` (width:52px, height:52px, border-radius:16px, background gradient, etc.) to globals.css. Import Loader2 from lucide-react and use a spinning Loader2 instead of the custom animated dots or alongside them.
Delete osai-web/components/navbar.tsx (dead code - the app uses sidebar.tsx now)
Do a final npm run typecheck and npm run build to confirm everything passes
Commit all changes with a descriptive commit message like 'fix: UI/UX review - shared components, design system compliance, inline style elimination' on the current branch
acceptance_criteria: Demo page uses CSS classes instead of inline styles
All changes are committed locally on feat/framer-design-ask-page branch
